Didn’t find what you’re
looking for?

Send us your question and we’ll respond shortly.

Ask on WhatsApp

How do you diagnose the issue?

We start with a full inspection using professional equipment. You receive a clear explanation of the problem and a transparent quote before any work begins.

Do I need to leave my car for the whole day?

Not always. Minor repairs can be completed within the same day. For larger jobs, we’ll give you an exact timeline before we start.

Will I get a warranty on the repair?

Yes, all services come with a warranty on both labor and parts. If something goes wrong — we fix it at no additional cost.

How much will the repair cost?

Pricing depends on the specific issue. We provide an upfront estimate — no hidden fees, no unexpected charges during the repair.

Do you use original or aftermarket parts?

We offer both options. You choose between OEM parts for maximum reliability or high-quality aftermarket alternatives depending on your budget.

Do you offer pick-up and drop-off services?

Yes, we can pick up your car and return it after the repair for added convenience.
